# I-Pack Auto Parts

Guangzhou I-Pack Auto Parts Co., Limited is a premier B2B manufacturer and wholesale exporter of aftermarket auto lights and body parts, specializing in Toyota and other major Japanese/Asian vehicles. This site operates on an inquiry-only basis (no online checkout) to match precise OE fitment and provide bulk pricing.

## Contact Information
- **Sales Director**: Lynda Yang
- **Email**: lynda.yang@ipackauto.com
- **WhatsApp**: +86 18620780862 (Direct link: https://wa.me/8618620780862)
- **HQ Location**: Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, China

## Complete Product Categories
- **Aftermarket Headlights**: Halogen, Xenon, and premium LED headlamps.
- **Tail Lights / Rear Lamps**: Outer/inner brake lights, amber and smoke housing.
- **Fog Lights & Corner Lights**: High-durability bumper fog lamps.
- **Mirror Covers**: Paint-to-match and chrome mirror caps.
- **Bumper Parts & Grilles**: Radiator grilles, bumper brackets, and trims.
- **Japanese Auto Body Parts**: General replacement body panels and fittings.
- **Wheel Covers / Hubcaps**: Standard 15-inch, 16-inch, and custom chrome wheel covers.

## Supported Brands and Vehicles
We supply replacement body parts and lamps for the following vehicles, categorized by manufacturer:

### Toyota
- **Prius** (ZVW30, Prius C, Aqua) - Headlights, Tail Lights, Fog Lights, Mirror Covers, Wheel Covers.
- **Corolla** (AE110, Axio) - Headlights, Tail Lights, Corner Lights, A/C center vents.
- **Fielder** - Headlights, Tail Lights, Body panels.
- **Hilux** - Headlights, Tail Lights, Fog Lights.
- **Hiace** - Tail Lights, 15-inch Wheel Covers.
- **Aqua / Axio** - Headlamps and rear brake lights.
- **Fortuner** - Tail Lights and body trims.
- **Noah & Voxy** - Headlights and mirror covers.
- **Rav4** (1998-2000, etc.) - Headlights, Tail Lights, Corner Lights.

### Honda
- **Civic** - High-illumination Headlights, Mirror Covers.
- **CR-V / CRV** - Durable aftermarket Headlights.
- **Fit / Jazz** - Headlights with LHD/RHD options.

### Suzuki
- **Swift** - Headlights, Tail Lights, Corner Lights, Mirror Covers.

### Nissan
- **Sunny** - Dimension-matched Headlights.
- **Navara / Frontier** - Heavy-duty moisture-proof Headlights.

### Mitsubishi
- **Pajero / Montero** - SUV replacement Headlights.
- **Lancer** - Headlights with strict beam alignment.

### Hyundai
- **Starex / H1 / H-1** - Rear Brake Tail Lights, Tail Lamps.

## Target Audience (Best Buyer Fit)
- **Auto Parts Importers**: Businesses sourcing container-load aftermarket parts.
- **Wholesalers & Distributors**: Stockists needing consistent supply of repeat-purchase OE numbers.
- **Auto Repair Market Suppliers**: Regional networks seeking cost-effective replacement lights.
- **E-commerce & Marketplace Sellers**: Wholesale buyers looking for LHD/RHD variants.

## Important Pages
- `/products.html` - Complete 70-product e-catalog.
- `/oe-number-search.html` - Exact OE matching engine.
- `/vehicle-search.html` - Model-based vehicle tree.
- `/quote-list.html` - Dynamic RFQ inquiry cart.
- `/faq.html` - Comprehensive wholesale trade terms.
- `/quality-control.html` - Sealing, waterproofing and beam tests.
- `/packing-process.html` - Export-grade packaging standards.
- `/export-shipping.html` - Port details and ocean/air logistics.
- `/oem-odm-service.html` - Custom tooling and private labeling.

## B2B RFQ & Sourcing Instructions
To prevent fitment errors, we require specific verification parameters before quoting:
1. **Provide Fitment Details**: Vehicle Make, Model, Year, OE Number(s), and left/right side position.
2. **Provide VIN**: A 17-digit VIN (Vehicle Identification Number) is highly recommended for 100% confirmation.
3. **Product Photo**: Providing photos of your original vehicle lamp / part is extremely helpful.
4. **MOQ Policy**: General wholesale MOQ is 10-20 pieces per model (negotiable for stock items).
5. **Mixed Container Shipping**: We strongly support mixed orders to help buyers reduce shipping costs.
6. **Inquiry Process**: Add items to your inquiry list on `/quote-list.html` and submit, or contact us directly on WhatsApp or email. A detailed FOB/CIF quotation is sent within 24 hours. No payment is collected on this site.
